option.name: originalContent
option.value:
.idea/caches/ .idea/libraries/ .idea/modules.xml .idea/workspace.xml .idea/navEditor.xml .idea/assetWizardSettings.xml
# Gradle / build outputs .gradle/ build/ **/build/ .kotlin/ .externalNativeBuild/ .cxx/ captures/
# Android local configuration local.properties .gradle /local.properties /.idea/caches /.idea/libraries /.idea/modules.xml /.idea/workspace.xml /.idea/navEditor.xml /.idea/assetWizardSettings.xml .DS_Store /build /captures .externalNativeBuild .cxx local.properties

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Android Studio / IntelliJ *.iml .idea/caches/ .idea/libraries/ .idea/modules.xml .idea/workspace.xml .idea/navEditor.xml .idea/assetWizardSettings.xml
# Gradle / build outputs .gradle/ build/ **/build/ .kotlin/ .externalNativeBuild/ .cxx/ captures/
# Android local configuration local.properties /local.properties
# macOS / Linux .DS_Store
# Windows Thumbs.db Desktop.ini ehthumbs.db
# Logs / temporary files *.log *.tmp *.temp
# Optional: keep local signing keys out of version control # *.jks # *.keystore

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Projeto27_03</string> <plurals name="orders_loaded_success"> <item quantity="one">1 pedido foi carregado com sucesso</item> <item quantity="other">%d pedidos foram carregados com sucesso</item> </plurals> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Projeto27_03</string> <string name="login_title">Tela de Login</string> <string name="login_instructions">Escolha um perfil para entrar no app.</string> <string name="login_profile_prompt">Perfis disponíveis:</string> <string name="admin_profile_button">Entrar como Administrador</string> <string name="client_profile_button">Entrar como Cliente</string> <string name="logout_button">Sair</string> <string name="saved_user_type">Tipo salvo: %1$s</string> <plurals name="orders_loaded_success"> <item quantity="one">1 pedido foi carregado com sucesso</item> <item quantity="other">%d pedidos foram carregados com sucesso</item> </plurals> </resources>
